name: musicbook-server
description: MusicBook + Score Viewer unified server (Express + Socket.io + MongoDB + Drive proxy)

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const p=process.env.PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR||path.join(process.cwd(),'.cache','puppeteer');process.env.PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR=p;console.log('[postinstall] PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR=',p);try{fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true});}catch(e){};try{fs.rmSync(path.join(p,'chrome'),{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync(path.join(p,'chrome-headless-shell'),{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('[postinstall] cache cleared');}catch(e){console.log('[postinstall] cache clear skipped');}" && DEBUG=puppeteer:* PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR=$PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR npx puppeteer browsers install chrome && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const puppeteer=require('puppeteer');const exe=puppeteer.executablePath();console.log('[postinstall] puppeteer.executablePath=',exe);if(!exe||!fs.existsSync(exe)){console.error('[postinstall] chrome executable missing');process.exit(1);}console.log('[postinstall] chrome ok');"
